description: Casual RAS unified shell: core defaults for the main window and the (host-role) pointer overlay. App commands (connect_to_host / disconnect / send_pointer / request_keyframe / start_sharing / stop_sharing / respond_consent) are exposed via the invoke handler. The only plugin permission is the signed auto-updater (ADR-078); update checking/installing is driven through app commands, so only `updater:default` is granted.
